---
title: "Introduction"
---


::: {.callout-tip}
# Learning Goals: Introduction
1. Know who your professor is
1. Know what you'll need to do to earn an A in this class
1. Identify one reason language is worth studying
1. Identify one reason that the brain is worth studying
1. Recognize that there are multiple levels at which one can understand a cognitive system (computational, algorithmic, implementation)
1. Give an arugment for why studying implementation alone is insufficient for complete understanding
:::

Classes in this unit:

| Date | Topic | Reading | Slides | Poll |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
| Thurs 9/27 | [Syllabus](index.qmd), [assignments](requirements.qmd), [schedule](schedule.md) | None |[<span class="blue-badge">↗</span>](https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/1S-twq_R9KZWHKwUxCgpskvh7g66OaMdo1Z-OYOKt820/edit?slide=id.g3d423b79775_0_0#slide=id.g3d423b79775_0_0)| [<span class="purple-badge">↗</span>](https://www.menti.com/bl6rvxw8d8o1) | 
| Tues 9/1 | Why neuroscience of language? | SGN Ch. 1: *Introduction* |  |
